Video.summary: Is it love, or fiction? 20-year-old Nick is desperate to get the love of his life back after one magical night of passion. Nick believes he's always been meant to be with Megan, even though he's only known her for 5 months. Megan however tells a very different tale, where Nick is imagining all the fate and passion between them. She claims they hardly know each other, and they've surely never slept together. Steve's not sure who's telling the truth, but the lie detector will yield the final results.
Video.title: Did We Have Sex?

Video.summary: Dustin wants a baby with his wife Tessa, but he thinks she is taking birth control because she's been cheating. Then, Anthony says that he's been physically abusive to his fiancee Marie, because he believes that she's been cheating on him.
Video.title: Steve I Don't Trust Her

Video.summary: Steve looks back on memorable stories of DNA clearing up years of doubt and mystery or devastating and confirming people's worst fears.
Video.title: DNA: Life-Changing Results

Video.summary: Chante’s daughter accused Danae of sexual abuse. Although Danae was cleared by the authorities, Chante’s mother Shelly never believed her innocence. But is Danae just covering up for her own lies? Did Chante’s mother sleep with her ex-husband?
Video.title: It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!

Image.alt: It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!
It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!
It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!

Video.summary: Steve helps set 2 wild teenage girls straight! They’ve been involved in drugs, sex, and gang activity!
Video.title: Teen Girls Go to Jail

Video.summary: Joshua suspects the mother of his 2 sons, Ricketta, of cheating and has paternity doubts.
Video.title: Steve, I Need a DNA Test

Image.alt: Steve, I Need a DNA Test
Steve, I Need a DNA Test
Steve, I Need a DNA Test

Video.summary: Nye and her boyfriend spent last Easter with her family, but he spent most of it drinking and ignoring her.
Video.title: I Caught You, Why Are You Still Lying?

Image.alt: I Caught You, Why Are You Still Lying?
I Caught You, Why Are You Still Lying?
I Caught You, Why Are You Still Lying?

Video.summary: Samantha believes that her 3 year old daughter was molested by her ex-boyfriend's brother, Chad. Chad denies sexually abusing the child and even took a voice stress test to prove his innocence. Now he wants to clear his name.
Video.title: We Tested You Six Times

Video.summary: Stephanie’s drug addiction led her to severely neglect and abuse their children. As Scott’s fiancée Amy has stepped in as a mother and Stephanie fails multiple drug tests, he doesn’t want her near the children, but wants her to atone for her wrongs!
Video.title: Mommy Hurt Me

Video.summary: First, Daniel has almost a dozen children with ten different women. While he admits to being their father, he refuses to care and provide for most of them. Then, Tadrianna strips and has sex for money and her mother, Kim, can't convince her to stop.
Video.title: I Have 11 Kids with 10 Women

Video.summary: On today’s 1000th episode, take a stroll down memory lane. We’ll bring you all of the craziest confessions!
Video.title: The 1000th Episode!

Video.summary: Shericka's ex Joseph wants a DNA test to find out if he's the father of her two sons.
Video.title: You Have A Baby With My Sister, I Don't Want You

Image.alt: You Have A Baby With My Sister, I Don't Want You
You Have A Baby With My Sister, I Don't Want You
You Have A Baby With My Sister, I Don't Want You

Video.summary: Melinda says that she should be given custody of Tiffany's son because Tiffany is allowing her boyfriends to physically abuse the boy. Tiffany swears that the abuse Is coming from the boys father Scott and not from her boyfriends.
Video.title: Results Reveal The Truth

Video.summary: Valarie is here to get custody of her children because she says their father Roy has been abusing them. Roy says that it's her boyfriend who is the abuser. Then, Jennifer is here to because she want's her sister Amber to leave her boyfriend Ceasarae.
Video.title: I've Seen Him Hit Her

Video.summary: Dorothy is 17 years old and has felt so uncomfortable living at home with her mom and stepdad, that she has resorted to selling her body to take care of herself. Then, Connie says her ex pressured her to get pregnant at 16 and then refused to help her support their child.
Video.title: Teen Girls In Trouble

Video.summary: Pamela is anorexic, bulimic, and on a mission to weigh 40 pounds. Will she confront her eating disorder?
Video.title: I’m Starving Myself to Death

Video.summary: Steve helps Jason, a father desperate to straighten out his son, Brandon, who likes to steal, vandalize, and sell drugs. Today Steve’s taking Brandon to Wayne County Jail to give him a preview of where he might end up if he doesn’t clean up his act.
Video.title: Steve, Lock Up My Son

Video.summary: Maurice wants to prove to that he’s faithful. Chuanhtee says fed up with Ladi’s cheating accusations!
Video.title: Steve Saw Right Through You

Video.summary: A couple's children are taken away after the six-month-old nearly dies from having a baby wipe lodged in her windpipe; Shawn says his daughter came home with severe bruising on her body after staying with her mother and told him her mother beat her.
Video.title: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him

Image.alt: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him

Video.summary: A sisters nightmare ... 11-year-old Ana is terrified of older brother Ray who's regularly beat her since she was just five years old. Ana's fears have grown so much, she fears for her life every night when she goes to bed. While Ray is only 13, his on-stage behavior reveals his true colors, and shocks even Steve. With Ana's mother out of solutions, it's up to Steve and past guest Gary, to show Ray a better path in life and help Ana.
Video.title: My Big Brother Beats Me

Video.summary: Elaina and her husband Lennard claim their daughter was raped by her brother-in-law Lenel. Lenel’s fiancée and Elaina’s sister, Elissa, believes they’re making up this entire story. Don’t miss the shocking results today!
Video.title: Justice Will Be Served Today

Video.summary: Ashley’s boyfriend Tyjuan thinks his abuse is justified because he suspects her of cheating and doubts the paternity of their five kids! Then, Natasha gave birth two weeks ago, but fears that the father is her rapist and not her husband Daniel!
Video.title: 5 Years of Abuse, Is He the Father?

Image.alt: 5 Years of Abuse, Is He the Father?
5 Years of Abuse, Is He the Father?
5 Years of Abuse, Is He the Father?

Video.summary: Chamira left her family for prostitution, but then she sent her sister Latoya a pornographic video featuring minors. Emily received calls claiming that her fiancé Kevin was cheating on her and selling drugs. What will the lie detector tests say?
Video.title: Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family

Image.alt: Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family
Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family
Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family

Video.summary: Jessica can't make sense of her on again off again relationship with Wade and it's starting to drive her crazy. Wade however claims he's had nothing to do with Jessica and she's been spreading lies and stalking him for years.
Video.title: I Am Not A Stalker

Video.summary: Cammie is here to find out once and for all if her ex sexually abused their 2-year-old daughter. Her doctor’s examination showed signs of sexual abuse. Her ex denies these allegations. But what will Steve’s lie detector test reveal?
Video.title: Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her

Image.alt: Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her
Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her
Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her

Video.summary: Hannah is tired of Nick's crazy accusations, hacking into her computer and texting her friends pretending to be her. Then, Nicole says she's never cheated on her husband Robert. She also claims that the constant accusations caused her to miscarry.
Video.title: You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?

Image.alt: You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?
You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?
You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?

Video.summary: Gina believes her grandson is being abused by her daughter's boyfriend Efrain. Her daughter wants to prove that he's innocent and is furious at her mom for accusing him. Was Gina right or is Efrain really innocent?
Video.title: How Could You Cover for Him?

Image.alt: How Could You Cover for Him?
How Could You Cover for Him?
How Could You Cover for Him?

Video.summary: Watch as Steve helps ordinary people stand up for themselves, and fight for what they believe in.
Video.title: A Mother in Denial

Video.summary: Courtney is here to find out why his fiancée Jasmine has never allowed him to see his daughter in person.
Video.title: A Cruel Lie

Video.summary: On August 5th, Amber’s 7 month old daughter was taken by police after cigarette burns were found all over her body. Amber’s mother, Vickie, found the burns and called the police, but who actually burned her?
Video.title: 4 Suspects: Who Will Fall?

Video.summary: Wade constantly accuses Angela of cheating on him and admits to beating and berating her. Angela is desperate for the abuse to end. Then, Stacy wants to prove to her boyfriend that she hasn’t been cheating on him with a lie detector test!
Video.title: I Beat Her Because She's Fat

Image.alt: I Beat Her Because She's Fat
I Beat Her Because She's Fat
I Beat Her Because She's Fat

Video.summary: Jayshanice suspects her physically abusive boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Scared to Death
